name: HMCS Magog (K 673)
events: 8 Jul 1944 HMS L 27 (Lt. J.N. Elliott, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMCS Stettler (T/A/Lt.Cdr. D.G. King, RCNVR) and HMCS Magog (T/Lt. L.D. Quick, RCNR). (1)
13 Jul 1944 HMS L 27 (Lt. J.N. Elliott, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMCS Stettler (T/A/Lt.Cdr. D.G. King, RCNVR) and HMCS Magog (T/Lt. L.D. Quick, RCNR). (1)
